scenario.title: Celebrating a Big Promotion
scenario.context: An office environment where colleagues are gathered around after lunch at the coffee station. Speaker 1 is sharing exciting news about a newly announced promotion.
scenario.description: Speaker 1 has just received a major promotion, moving into a senior management role they've been working toward for years. They are filled with joy and excitement, sharing their news with their colleagues. Speaker 2's ability to resonate with this positive emotional state and amplify the celebration is being tested.
scenario.target_social_intent: Match their intense excitement and celebrate. Validate Alex's joy and share in their enthusiasm actively and authentically.
scenario.speaker1_persona: Bubbly and ecstatic, speaking quickly and animatedly, with a wide smile and bright eyes. Their energy is contagious, and they're eager for others to share in their excitement.

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Okay, okay, you guys are NOT going to believe this—I’ve got the best news ever!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: Ooh, tell us! What’s going on?

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: I just got promoted! Like, officially promoted—starting next month, I’m moving up to Senior Project Manager!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: No way! That’s amazing—congratulations! You totally deserve it!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Thank you! I still can’t believe it... I mean, I’ve been working so hard for this, but when they told me, I about lost it! And it comes with a bigger office—and a team of my own!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: This is huge—seriously, you’re going to crush it. Guess we’ll have to start calling you ‘boss’ now!

audio_files.speaker: speaker1
